name: ProgressErrorReportingEventArgs
summary: Event arguments used for the Application::ProgressErrorReporting event

properties.name: Canceled
properties.summary: Sets a value indicating whether the operation should be canceled.

properties.name: ErrorCode
properties.summary: Gets the error code that describes the current Error.

properties.name: IsFileError
properties.summary: Gets whether the Error being reported was related to a file operation.

properties.name: Message
properties.summary: Gets a message that describes the current error.

properties.name: Progress
properties.summary: Gets a reference to the Progress class instance relating to this Event.
